title: YO14 0PG, Willerby Wold Piggeries Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/YP3332QH/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Willerby Wold Piggeries Limited Installation name: Field House Farm Permit number: EPR/YP3332QH/A001  "
